title: Transe Decar
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:Transe_Decar.jpg]] |name=Transe Decar |homeworld=[[Zaloriis/Legends|Zaloriis]]''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' |birth= |death=Between [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]] and the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]At the [[Time/Legends|time]] of Transe Decar's [[Death/Legends|death]], [[Maximilian Veers/Legends|Maximilian Veers]] held the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]], which he previously held at the time of the events of the story ''[[Side Trip]]'', which ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' placed in [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]]. In ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'', the [[Zaloriis campaign/Legends|battle]] in which Decar died occurred prior to the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' placed in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. Therefore, Decar's death must have occurred between 2 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]] and 3 ABY. |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Zalorian/Legends|Zalorian]]}} |gender= |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Light |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Zalorian Separatists]] *[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|What is this?''"
"''Zaloriis formally declares its independence.''"
"''Request denied, Minister.''"
"''What the… ''[chokes]''|Darth Vader and Transe Decar, at the latter's execution|audio=VaderAndDecar.flac|}} '''Transe Decar''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Zalor Minister|minister]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Zaloriis/Legends|Zaloriis]] during the rule of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Sometime between [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Decar and a group called the [[Zalorian Separatists]] defected from the Empire to the growing [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] against it. Decar avoided paying Zaloriis's [[Standard month/Legends|monthly]] tribute to the Empire, which attracted the attention of the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. He traveled to Zaloriis to investigate, where Decar ambushed Vader and revealed his defection to the Rebellion as he declared independence from the Empire. Vader, however, was unfazed by the announcement and used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to [[Telekinesis/Legends|strangle]] Decar. ==Biography== {{Quote|Minister Decar, this is Darth Vader.''"
"''I'm here, Darth.|Darth Vader, to Transe Decar|audio=ZalorMinister.flac|}} A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Zalorian/Legends|Zalorian]], Transe Decar served as a [[Zalor Minister|minister]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Zaloriis/Legends|Zaloriis]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Zaloriis system/Legends|Zaloriis system]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Zaloriis system/Legends|Zaloriis system]] during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. At some point during Decar's tenure as minister, the Empire initiated a top-secret research project on Zaloriis, the development of the [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]], overseen by [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Maximilian Veers/Legends|Maximilian Veers]]. Sometime between [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]] and the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a conflict between the Empire and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], Decar and an organization called the [[Zalorian Separatists]] defected from the Empire and secretly joined the Rebellion. Together, they seized control of the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial forces]] on the planet, placing a large number of Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] in [[Prison/Legends|prison]] and arresting Colonel Veers. Decar also deliberately avoided paying Zaloriis's [[Standard month/Legends|monthly]] tribute to the Empire. [[File:Decar_meets_Vader.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Decar (top left) ambushes Darth Vader.]] The lack of tribute attracted the attention of the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], who had been hunting the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] since the loss of the Empire's planet-destroying [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]], the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]], at the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Knowing that the fleet's trail had grown cold after he [[Reytha campaign|defeated]] the Rebels on the planet [[Reytha]], Vader took Decar's actions as a vague clue to the Rebel [[Fleet/Legends|fleet's]] whereabouts and decided to visit Zaloriis personally to meet with him. Decar planned to capture Vader at the meeting by surrounding him and his entourage with [[Zalor Militiaman|Zalor Militiamen]].[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] Arriving in a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]], Vader and eight stormtroopers walked a short distance from their landing site to meet with Decar. Decar's six militiamen surrounded the Imperial forces while he revealed Zaloriis's defection. Vader was unconcerned by his announcement and quickly used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to [[Telekinesis/Legends|choke]] the minister to [[Death/Legends|death]]. Vader then questioned one of [[Unidentified Zalor militiaman|Decar's soldiers]] on the location of the stormtroopers who had been captured and subsequently rescued them and Veers. The Empire proceeded to [[Zaloriis campaign/Legends|destroy]] the Rebel Alliance uprising on Zaloriis using the All Terrain Armored Transports. ==Personality and traits== Although the development of the All Terrain Armored Transport took place on Zaloriis, Decar was not given command of the project, and the Empire speculated that he was unaware of its existence. Decar was willing to betray the Empire and lured [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Vader into a trap to capture him and declare his planet's independence. The minister was confused when Vader rejected Decar's "request" and screamed as he perished in the Sith Lord's Force grip. Decar had [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]], light skin, and a mustache. ==Equipment== Decar wielded a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] when he confronted Vader. He wore a purple [[Clothing/Legends|cloak]] and a brown cap. ==Behind the scenes== Transe Decar was first mentioned, with his surname mispelled as "Decaar," in ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' by [[Steven L. Kent]],[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] released on [[November 7]], [[2001]].{{Amazon|url=Star-Wars-Galactic-Battlegrounds-Official/dp/0761537503|text=Star Wars Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide}} The character then appeared in the [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'', released on [[November 11]], 2001.{{GameSpot|url=games/star-wars-galactic-battlegrounds|text=Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds}} He was voiced by [[Michael Gough]] and was featured in the beginning of the fourth level of the Imperial campaign, "An Empire's Fury." Decar's in-game sprite and image are almost identical to the Zalor Militiamen, the only difference being that Decar is wearing a cloak. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}} {{1stID|Transe Decar}} *''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] {{1stm}} {{C|as Transe Decaar}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Transe Decar|soundcat=Audio files of Transe Decar}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Transe Decar }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Decar, Transe}} [[Category:Alliance to Restore the Republic members]] [[Category:Bureaucrats of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial defectors]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Zalorians]]
